race.comment: LA PETITE (11) has built nicely into her debut campaign and is ready to finally strike after closing strong to just miss here last time. If Crowther can settle a pair closer, she will prove very tough to deny. LOVE TO LIE (12) is a Ghaiyyath filly on debut for the Doudle camp, who has caught the eye at the trials. Is drawn to advantage and keeps Price from most recent hitout. Expect her to attract support. AQUAFOX (1) never fired a shot last time but had been knocking on the door prior. Willing to forgive. GRINZINGER GOLD (10) backs up quickly after chasing gamely into the placings behind a hotpot on Wednesday here. Draws well for Milnes and and can go a couple better. I'M A MILLENNIAL (3) has been much better in his last two when chasing gamely into the placings. Freshened with 35 days, keeping the legs ticking over with a trial win at headquarters. Finds it tough to break through but is worth keeping in mind.
